title: Dimorphostemon pinnatifidus
taxonomy: Dimorphostemon pinnatifidus is a genus of flowering plants in the family Apocynaceae. The classification of Dimorphostemon pinnatifidus is further broken down into its genus and species. As a part of the Apocynaceae family, Dimorphostemon pinnatifidus is a type of vine or shrub native to tropical and subtropical regions. The Apocynaceae family, to which Dimorphostemon pinnatifidus belongs, consists of a diverse group of plants commonly known as dogbane or oleander. Dimorphostemon pinnatifidus is often found growing in dense forests and woodland areas.
